title: Fix alias sequence extraction in code generator
description: The extractAliasSequences function in extract.go only supported flat format [prodID][childIdx] = sym, but many grammars (C, C++, Rust, etc.) use nested format [prodID] = { [childIdx] = sym }. This caused type_identifier, field_identifier, and other alias symbols to be missing from generated grammars, which was the #1 cause of corpus test failures.
